layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — patience is the smartest play right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins bleeding heavily over the past week. Bitcoin dominance at 56.3% means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin, which makes it a tough environment to buy altcoins. While a few coins like TRUMP and ZRO are hitting oversold levels that could trigger a bounce, the chart structures are bearish across the board with no clear catalyst to reverse the trend yet. Waiting for clearer signs of a bottom is the disciplined move.
layman_action: Stay in cash for now. The market is showing fear but hasn't shown a convincing reversal signal yet. Watch for oversold bounces in the next 48-72 hours before committing capital.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate shows bearish chart structure with prices below key moving averages. The Fear & Greed index at 26 is improving from 24 weekly average, which is a historically reliable signal per our track record (80% win rate), but fear alone isn't enough — we need a technical trigger. ZRO at RSI 31 near $0.90 support offers the cleanest potential bounce setup with 16.5x R/R, but the bearish Marubozu and downtrend momentum suggest the knife is still falling. BTC dominance at 56.3% is actively punishing alts. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) with bullish Marubozu, but its R/R of 0.11x is terrible — resistance at $0.40 is right above current price. The prudent approach is to wait for ZRO to confirm a hold of $0.90 support or for broader market fear to push toward extreme levels (sub-20) which historically precede stronger bounces.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% continues to drain capital from altcoins, potentially extending the alt selloff
No volume breakout signals detected on any candidate — our most reliable technical signal (100% win rate) is absent
Bitcoin analysts citing potential 2022 bear market repeat could trigger further risk-off sentiment across all alts
watch_list: ZRO price action at $0.90 support — a hold and bounce with volume would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index movement toward extreme fear (<20) which historically marks better entry points
BTC dominance — any reversal below 55% would signal rotation back into alts
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear regime with BTC flat near $63,774 while altcoins bleed 10-25% weekly. Bitcoin dominance at 56.3% confirms capital is hiding in BTC, making this a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades.
context_banner: Market fear is building but no oversold bounce has confirmed — discipline demands patience over premature entry.

key_signals.description: Fear at 26 improving from 24 weekly avg — historically 80% reliable but not yet at extreme levels that produce the strongest bounces.
ZRO RSI at 31 and TRUMP RSI at 29 are approaching oversold, but neither has confirmed a reversal candle yet.
Bitcoin described as nearing 'late stages of bear market' by Jamie Coutts — if correct, current fear may be the setup for a broader recovery, but timing remains uncertain.
Crypto IPO market stalling and Bitcoin treasury companies selling BTC signal institutional caution that weighs on risk appetite.
No volume breakout detected on any candidate — our highest-conviction signal (100% win rate, +13.4% avg return) is completely absent this cycle.
